trend.note: BTC dropped from $74.5K to $64.9K, bouncing to $68.2K. Bearish trend with relief bounce.

oracle_consensus.note: 6/6 oracles SHORT from $78K-$105K BTC. Still profitable but Oracle #2 ETH short now losing.

institutional_flow.note: ETF flipped from -$158M outflow to +$1.175B inflow in one day. Major reversal signal.

regime.pillar_summary: 2/3 bearish (trend + oracle), 1/3 shifting (ETF flows reversed). Net: bearish but weakening.
regime_change_triggers: BTC closes above $72K (above 14d midpoint) → reassess to Ranging/Risk-On
2+ consecutive days ETF inflow > $500M → elevate institutional pillar to bullish
3+ oracles close their BTC shorts → oracle consensus breaking

macro_context.geopolitical: Middle East escalation (Iran-Kuwait-US). Risk-off pressure but BTC acting as safe haven.
macro_context.monetary: Unknown — need DXY/M2 data from BlockBeats
macro_context.note: BTC ignoring geopolitical risk-off = potential regime shift to digital gold narrative

history.event: Initial assessment. 6/6 oracles SHORT, BTC at $66.8K.
ETF inflow $1.175B. BTC holds $68K despite Iran escalation. KOSPI +7%.
